headline: Trump 💥💣 BOOMS Venezuelan Drug Dock 🍑🚤 - CIA Drone SIMPING? 👀🛩️
text:
ORANGE MAN 🍊👨‍💼 Trump DADDY dropping BOMBS 💣🔥 on VENEZUELA'S 😤 narco-DOCK 🛥️💦 where Maduro's BOYS 👦 load up them DRUG BOATS 🚤🍄 like it's a CARTEL RAVE 🎉💨! 'MAJOR EXPLOSION 💥😱 at the LOAD-UP ZONE 📍' – that's where they STUFF the fentanyl FEAST 🍆🌮 and coke CANDY 🍭 into go-fast GHOST RIDERS 👻🏎️, but Donnie's like 'I KNOW WHO DID IT 🕵️‍♂️🤫 but SHHHH, no CIA DRONE TEA ☕🛩️!' CNN & NYT spilling SOURCES 💅📈 saying it's the FIRST US RAID inside Maduro's MADHOUSE 🇻🇪🤪 – escalation AF like Trump threatening LAND INVASION 🪖🍑 on that narco-TERRORIST 🤡👑!

Trump on RADIO 📻 last week: 'We HIT a BIG FACILITY 🏭💥 linked to them Venezuelan SPEED BOATS 🏃‍♂️🚤!' Reporters SIMPING 🤤 'CIA DO IT? 👀' and Donnie GOAT 🐐: 'Don't wanna SAY but I KNOW 👆😏!' No VENEZUELAN STATE MEDIA 📺🚫 crying about it, just SOCIAL MEDIA SPECULATION 🐦💥 – Maduro GHOSTED 👻 like Epstein on island vacay 🏝️🍆! US been SLAYING 30+ DRUG BOATS 📉🔪 since Sept, 100+ narcos SUNK 💀🌊 in Pacific & Caribbean GOON HUNTS 🏹🌴, latest Monday ZAPPING two 'narco-terrorists' ⚡🪦 per Southern Command's LIT POST 📱💀!

But NO PICS/VIDS 📸🚫 of the DOCK BLAST 🌋 – Pentagon SIMPS to White House 🤷‍♂️🏛️ while Trump signals NEW PHASE 🚀: 'We HIT ALL BOATS 🛥️💥, now the IMPLEMENTATION AREA 📍 GONE FOREVER 💨👻!' Maduro's crew ACCUSED of NARCO-TERROR ORGY 🎊💰 funding via OIL TANKERS ⛽🛳️ – US seized TWO, chased THIRD like PIRATES 🏴‍☠️🍑, Maduro crying 'YANQUI PIRACY 🦜😭 STEALING OUR OIL DADDY reserves 🌍💎!' VENEZUELA just TRANSIT HOE 🛣️👯 for Mexican FENTANYL FLOOD 🌊💊 smuggled over BORDER WALL? 🤔🧱

Trump TROLLING 👑😂: 'Seizures prolly FORCE Maduro OUT 💨👋 – SMART MOVE for him, UP TO HIM but WE'LL SEE 👀!' War on DRUGS 💊⚔️ or EXCUSE to YEET Maduro like a bad EX 🍑🚮? US NAVAL BLOCKADE 🚢⛓️ in Caribbean, designating Maduro FTO 🤡🚫 – fentanyl MAINLY from MEXICO TACO BELL south 🧱🇲🇽 but Trump like 'VENEZUELA BAD GUYS TOO 🥷!' Counter-narc experts YAWNING 😴 'VZ minor player' but ORANGE DADDY don't care, he's DROPPING MIC 🎤💥 on global GOONS! No evidence on boats? WHO CARES when EXPLOSIONS GO BRRRR 💣📈‼️
